title: Most Americans distrust AI use in media, entertainment
text:
Most Americans distrust AI use in media, entertainment
2025-10-17
While 70% of respondents to an iHeartMedia survey say they use AI for its helpfulness and time-saving benefits, 75% do not want the technology involved in media or entertainment. The findings indicate a persistent distrust of AI in these areas, regardless of whether individuals currently use AI, suggesting a clear desire for human-driven content.
Full story:
The Hollywood Reporter
